title: Blue Squadron (Bothan)

{{Quote|Some of my gunners can pick flies off a wall with their laser cannons.|[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], exaggerating the abilities of Blue Squadron|<ref name="SOTE" />}}
'''Blue Squadron''', also known as '''Blue Squad''', was a [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] of 24<ref name="SWE">''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> inexperienced [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] and [[Gunner/Legends|gunners]] who flew [[BTL-S3 Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL-S3 Y-wing starfighters]] in support of the [[Bothan Spynet/Legends|Bothan Spynet's]] efforts to aid the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. The designations and color name of the unit were applied by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]. The Bothan pilots who would operate as Blue Squadron had less than a hundred hours of flight time in their Y-wings and were fair shots, according to [[Koth Melan]].<ref name="SOTE" /> The Bothan pilots of this unit were joined by [[Human/Legends|human]] Rebel pilot [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]], selected to fill an opening in the squadron due to his exemplary record.<ref name="Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance">''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''</ref>

==History==
===Raid on the ''Suprosa''===
Under the command of [[Rogue Leader/Legends|Rogue Leader]] [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] Luke Skywalker in his [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]], Blue Squadron flew cover for a [[Raid on the Suprosa|data-raid on the Imperial armed freighter ''Suprosa'']] by a Bothan team boarding via the [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] [[Dash Rendar/Legends|Dash Rendar's]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]], the [[Outrider/Legends|''Outrider'']], to capture a supercomputer later revealed to hold the plans of the [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star]]. During the battle, the ''[[Suprosa]]'' launched a single [[MS-15 diamond boron missile|diamond boron missile]] at the incoming fighters. Despite the best efforts of Rendar to defeat the missile, it successfully detonated in the midst of the Blue Squadron formation, obliterating four craft and their crews in an instant. Through the combined efforts of Skywalker and Azzameen, the freighter was disabled. Once the ship had been surrendered and the supercomputer obtained, the surviving squadron members traveled to [[Kothlis/Legends|Kothlis]], delivering the data to the expert [[Slicer/Legends|slicers]] of the Spynet. Six fighters, twelve Bothans in total, were destroyed in the raid.<ref name="SOTE" /><ref name="Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance" />

*[[Blue Two/Legends|Blue Two]] - Unknown pilot† / gunner†<ref name="SOTE" />
*[[Blue Four/Legends|Blue Four]] - Unknown pilot† / gunner†<ref name="SOTE" />
*[[Blue Six/Legends|Blue Six]] - Ace Azzameen<ref name="Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance" />

==Behind the scenes==
Although the novel [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Shadows of the Empire'']] implies that Blue Squadron consists entirely of Bothans, the video game ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' features its protagonist, the human Ace Azzameen, as Blue Six.<ref name="SOTE" /><ref name="Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance" />
